details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectories reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to both be present.
reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs, reports/audit/ exists.

Moltbot code directory moltbot/ still present with active Python modules (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot. alpaca_codebase_payload.txt describes moltbot modules as active components.
